summary: Iteration 24 Testing: Hardcoded Color Fixes + Logo/Favicon Feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified CSS variable system is working correctly - admin has customized colors and they are being applied. Logo On/Off/Favicon fields are present in Settings > General tab with ImageUpload components.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123! returns token
Backend: Public settings API returns logo_on, logo_off, favicon fields
Backend: Admin settings API returns logo_on, logo_off, favicon fields
Backend: Admin can update logo_on field via settings API
Backend: Admin can update logo_off field via settings API
Backend: Admin can update favicon field via settings API
Backend: Settings has theme_colors structure (website, my_account, admin groups)
Frontend: Homepage loads with Modern theme styling
Frontend: Admin Settings > General tab shows Logo On, Logo Off, Favicon fields with ImageUpload components
Frontend: Admin Portfolio page Add button uses CSS variable (--ad-button-bg) - shows purple (admin customized)
Frontend: My Account Community page radio buttons use CSS variable (--ma-accent) via inline style
Frontend: My Account Logout button is gray (not red) - uses CSS variable
Frontend: My Account Membership Profile Change Password button is gray/neutral (not hardcoded gold)
Frontend: My Account View Bio modal Summary/Biography headings use CSS variable (--ma-accent) - shows green (admin customized)

my_account_colors.status: WORKING - admin has customized to green

admin_colors.status: WORKING - admin has customized to purple

hardcoded_color_fixes.change_password_button: Uses CSS variable via inline style - FIXED
hardcoded_color_fixes.logout_button: Uses CSS variable via inline style (gray, not red) - FIXED
hardcoded_color_fixes.admin_portfolio_add_button: CSS override in index.css maps bg-[#0D9488] to var(--ad-button-bg) - FIXED

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified the hardcoded color fixes and Logo/Favicon feature. Key findings: (1) CSS variable system is working correctly - My Account uses --ma-* variables, Admin uses --ad-* variables, Website uses --color-* variables. (2) The admin has customized colors: My Account accent is green, Admin button is purple. (3) Logo On/Off/Favicon fields are in Settings > General tab with ImageUpload components (upload + URL input). (4) All previously hardcoded colors now use CSS variables via inline styles or CSS overrides in index.css. (5) The CSS override approach in index.css maps Tailwind arbitrary classes like bg-[#0D9488] to CSS variables within scoped containers (data-testid='admin-layout' and data-testid='myaccount-layout').
